ASSISTANTMESSAGE #124
mcp__linear__save_comment TOOL CALL 
{
  "issueId": "207a955d-7044-4ef7-bb0a-b6b712180f56",
  "body": "## QA Test Report \u2014 FRG-237\n\n**Target:** https://hey-chill.vercel.app  \n**Suite:** Playwright (Chromium headless)  \n**Branch:** `chillkimtest/frg-237-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill`  \n**Repo:** https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/hey-chill-qa\n\n---\n\n### Results: 54 / 54 passed \u2705\n\n| Suite | Tests | Result |\n|---|---|---|\n| Smoke | 7 | \u2705 All pass |\n| Push-to-talk UI | 7 | \u2705 All pass |\n| Transcription display | 7 | \u2705 All pass |\n| VAD silence timeout | 4 | \u2705 All pass |\n| Slack webhook send | 8 | \u2705 All pass |\n| Settings modal | 8 | \u2705 All pass |\n| PWA / Service Worker | 13 | \u2705 All pass |\n\n---\n\n### What was tested\n\n**Smoke**\n- Page title is \"Hey Chill\", heading \"Chill\" visible\n- Mic button present and enabled\n- Settings modal opens\n- `/manifest.json` valid (name, display: standalone, icons array)\n- Service worker registered at scope root, state = `activated`\n- `/sw.js` reachable with `Content-Type: application/javascript`\n- Empty state placeholder visible\n\n**Push-to-talk UI**\n- `aria-pressed` / `aria-label` transitions on click\n- `mic-ring` and `mic-btn` gain/lose `.recording` class\n- Hint text changes: \"Tap to speak\" \u2194 \"Tap to stop\"\n- Live transcript panel appears on start, hides on stop\n- Not-supported banner hidden when API available; shown + button disabled when removed\n\n**Transcription display**\n- Interim results update `#live-text` in real time\n- Final results accumulate and appear in transcript bar after stop\n- Multiple final results are concatenated\n- Transcript bar hidden when recording ends with no speech\n- Discard button clears transcript bar\n\n**VAD (3500 ms silence)**\n- Auto-stop fires after exactly 3500 ms of silence (verified with `page.clock`)\n- Speech result resets the timer; recording continues\n- `SILENCE_DELAY = 3500` constant confirmed in source\n\n**Slack webhook**\n- POST made to configured URL with `method = POST`\n- Payload shape: `{ text, source: \"hey-chill\", timestamp: ISO-8601 }`\n- `Content-Type: application/json` header present\n- Message status: \"Sent\" on 200, \"Failed\" on 500, \"No webhook set\" when unconfigured\n- Message text HTML-escaped (no `<script>` injection possible)\n\n**Settings modal**\n- Opens on settings button; closes via X / Escape / backdrop click\n- Webhook URL saved to `localStorage` on Save; pre-populated on reopen\n- Persists across page reload; can be cleared\n\n**PWA**\n- Manifest has all required fields; `display: standalone`\n- 192 \u00d7 192 and 512 \u00d7 512 icons present and reachable\n- `<link rel=\"manifest\">` in HTML head\n- `theme-color` meta matches manifest `theme_color`\n- `apple-mobile-web-app-capable` meta present\n- Served over HTTPS\n- Service worker scope covers `hey-chill.vercel.app`, state = `activated`\n\n---\n\n### Notes\n\n- Web Speech API is not available in headless Chromium. A `MockSpeechRecognition` is injected via `page.addInitScript()` before each test. The mock fires `start`, `result`, and `end` events controllably from the test side.\n- VAD tests use `page.clock.install()` (fake timers) so no real 3.5-second waits are needed.\n- Webhook tests use `page.route()` for network interception \u2014 no real webhook is hit.\n\n---\n\n### Recommendation: \u2705 APPROVE \u2014 mark Done\n\nAll M1 acceptance criteria are met. The app is stable at the current deployment."
}

      "issueId": "207a955d-7044-4ef7-bb0a-b6b712180f56",
      "body": "## QA Test Report \u2014 FRG-237\n\n**Target:** https://hey-chill.vercel.app  \n**Suite:** Playwright (Chromium headless)  \n**Branch:** `chillkimtest/frg-237-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill`  \n**Repo:** https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/hey-chill-qa\n\n---\n\n### Results: 54 / 54 passed \u2705\n\n| Suite | Tests | Result |\n|---|---|---|\n| Smoke | 7 | \u2705 All pass |\n| Push-to-talk UI | 7 | \u2705 All pass |\n| Transcription display | 7 | \u2705 All pass |\n| VAD silence timeout | 4 | \u2705 All pass |\n| Slack webhook send | 8 | \u2705 All pass |\n| Settings modal | 8 | \u2705 All pass |\n| PWA / Service Worker | 13 | \u2705 All pass |\n\n---\n\n### What was tested\n\n**Smoke**\n- Page title is \"Hey Chill\", heading \"Chill\" visible\n- Mic button present and enabled\n- Settings modal opens\n- `/manifest.json` valid (name, display: standalone, icons array)\n- Service worker registered at scope root, state = `activated`\n- `/sw.js` reachable with `Content-Type: application/javascript`\n- Empty state placeholder visible\n\n**Push-to-talk UI**\n- `aria-pressed` / `aria-label` transitions on click\n- `mic-ring` and `mic-btn` gain/lose `.recording` class\n- Hint text changes: \"Tap to speak\" \u2194 \"Tap to stop\"\n- Live transcript panel appears on start, hides on stop\n- Not-supported banner hidden when API available; shown + button disabled when removed\n\n**Transcription display**\n- Interim results update `#live-text` in real time\n- Final results accumulate and appear in transcript bar after stop\n- Multiple final results are concatenated\n- Transcript bar hidden when recording ends with no speech\n- Discard button clears transcript bar\n\n**VAD (3500 ms silence)**\n- Auto-stop fires after exactly 3500 ms of silence (verified with `page.clock`)\n- Speech result resets the timer; recording continues\n- `SILENCE_DELAY = 3500` constant confirmed in source\n\n**Slack webhook**\n- POST made to configured URL with `method = POST`\n- Payload shape: `{ text, source: \"hey-chill\", timestamp: ISO-8601 }`\n- `Content-Type: application/json` header present\n- Message status: \"Sent\" on 200, \"Failed\" on 500, \"No webhook set\" when unconfigured\n- Message text HTML-escaped (no `<script>` injection possible)\n\n**Settings modal**\n- Opens on settings button; closes via X / Escape / backdrop click\n- Webhook URL saved to `localStorage` on Save; pre-populated on reopen\n- Persists across page reload; can be cleared\n\n**PWA**\n- Manifest has all required fields; `display: standalone`\n- 192 \u00d7 192 and 512 \u00d7 512 icons present and reachable\n- `<link rel=\"manifest\">` in HTML head\n- `theme-color` meta matches manifest `theme_color`\n- `apple-mobile-web-app-capable` meta present\n- Served over HTTPS\n- Service worker scope covers `hey-chill.vercel.app`, state = `activated`\n\n---\n\n### Notes\n\n- Web Speech API is not available in headless Chromium. A `MockSpeechRecognition` is injected via `page.addInitScript()` before each test. The mock fires `start`, `result`, and `end` events controllably from the test side.\n- VAD tests use `page.clock.install()` (fake timers) so no real 3.5-second waits are needed.\n- Webhook tests use `page.route()` for network interception \u2014 no real webhook is hit.\n\n---\n\n### Recommendation: \u2705 APPROVE \u2014 mark Done\n\nAll M1 acceptance criteria are met. The app is stable at the current deployment."
    },
    "caller": {
      "type": "direct"
    }
  }
}
USERMESSAGE #125
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
{"id":"8935ae29-f414-4fb5-93e7-c49c80330677","body":"## QA Test Report — FRG-237

**Target:** https://hey-chill.vercel.app  
**Suite:** Playwright (Chromium headless)  
**Branch:** `chillkimtest/frg-237-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill`  
**Repo:** https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/hey-chill-qa

---

### Results: 54 / 54 passed ✅

| Suite | Tests | Result |
|---|---|---|
| Smoke | 7 | ✅ All pass |
| Push-to-talk UI | 7 | ✅ All pass |
| Transcription display | 7 | ✅ All pass |
| VAD silence timeout | 4 | ✅ All pass |
| Slack webhook send | 8 | ✅ All pass |
| Settings modal | 8 | ✅ All pass |
| PWA / Service Worker | 13 | ✅ All pass |

---

### What was tested

**Smoke**
- Page title is \"Hey Chill\", heading \"Chill\" visible
- Mic button present and enabled
- Settings modal opens
- `/manifest.json` valid (name, display: standalone, icons array)
- Service worker registered at scope root, state = `activated`
- `/sw.js` reachable with `Content-Type: application/javascript`
- Empty state placeholder visible

**Push-to-talk UI**
- `aria-pressed` / `aria-label` transitions on click
- `mic-ring` and `mic-btn` gain/lose `.recording` class
- Hint text changes: \"Tap to speak\" ↔ \"Tap to stop\"
- Live transcript panel appears on start, hides on stop
- Not-supported banner hidden when API available; shown + button disabled when removed

**Transcription display**
- Interim results update `#live-text` in real time
- Final results accumulate and appear in transcript bar after stop
- Multiple final results are concatenated
- Transcript bar hidden when recording ends with no speech
- Discard button clears transcript bar

**VAD (3500 ms silence)**
- Auto-stop fires after exactly 3500 ms of silence (verified with `page.clock`)
- Speech result resets the timer; recording continues
- `SILENCE_DELAY = 3500` constant confirmed in source

**Slack webhook**
- POST made to configured URL with `method = POST`
- Payload shape: `{ text, source: \"hey-chill\", timestamp: ISO-8601 }`
- `Content-Type: application/json` header present
- Message status: \"Sent\" on 200, \"Failed\" on 500, \"No webhook set\" when unconfigured
- Message text HTML-escaped (no `<script>` injection possible)

**Settings modal**
- Opens on settings button; closes via X / Escape / backdrop click
- Webhook URL saved to `localStorage` on Save; pre-populated on reopen
- Persists across page reload; can be cleared

**PWA**
- Manifest has all required fields; `display: standalone`
- 192 × 192 and 512 × 512 icons present and reachable
- `<link rel=\"manifest\">` in HTML head
- `theme-color` meta matches manifest `theme_color`
- `apple-mobile-web-app-capable` meta present
- Served over HTTPS
- Service worker scope covers `hey-chill.vercel.app`, state = `activated`

---

### Notes

- Web Speech API is not available in headless Chromium. A `MockSpeechRecognition` is injected via `page.addInitScript()` before each test. The mock fires `start`, `result`, and `end` events controllably from the test side.
- VAD tests use `page.clock.install()` (fake timers) so no real 3.5-second waits are needed.
- Webhook tests use `page.route()` for network interception — no real webhook is hit.

---

### Recommendation: ✅ APPROVE — mark Done

All M1 acceptance criteria are met. The app is stable at the current deployment.","createdAt":"2026-03-08T02:28:59.907Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T02:28:59.884Z","author":{"id":"b5a6e03a-2da1-4e78-951b-81497e2a00f7","name":"Chill"}}
▶ VIEW RAW DATA

  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_01FKXZAdLapLyGxa1jzKiimN",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": [
      {
        "type": "text",
        "text": "{\"id\":\"8935ae29-f414-4fb5-93e7-c49c80330677\",\"body\":\"## QA Test Report \u2014 FRG-237\\n\\n**Target:** https://hey-chill.vercel.app  \\n**Suite:** Playwright (Chromium headless)  \\n**Branch:** `chillkimtest/frg-237-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill`  \\n**Repo:** https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/hey-chill-qa\\n\\n---\\n\\n### Results: 54 / 54 passed \u2705\\n\\n| Suite | Tests | Result |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| Smoke | 7 | \u2705 All pass |\\n| Push-to-talk UI | 7 | \u2705 All pass |\\n| Transcription display | 7 | \u2705 All pass |\\n| VAD silence timeout | 4 | \u2705 All pass |\\n| Slack webhook send | 8 | \u2705 All pass |\\n| Settings modal | 8 | \u2705 All pass |\\n| PWA / Service Worker | 13 | \u2705 All pass |\\n\\n---\\n\\n### What was tested\\n\\n**Smoke**\\n- Page title is \\\"Hey Chill\\\", heading \\\"Chill\\\" visible\\n- Mic button present and enabled\\n- Settings modal opens\\n- `/manifest.json` valid (name, display: standalone, icons array)\\n- Service worker registered at scope root, state = `activated`\\n- `/sw.js` reachable with `Content-Type: application/javascript`\\n- Empty state placeholder visible\\n\\n**Push-to-talk UI**\\n- `aria-pressed` / `aria-label` transitions on click\\n- `mic-ring` and `mic-btn` gain/lose `.recording` class\\n- Hint text changes: \\\"Tap to speak\\\" \u2194 \\\"Tap to stop\\\"\\n- Live transcript panel appears on start, hides on stop\\n- Not-supported banner hidden when API available; shown + button disabled when removed\\n\\n**Transcription display**\\n- Interim results update `#live-text` in real time\\n- Final results accumulate and appear in transcript bar after stop\\n- Multiple final results are concatenated\\n- Transcript bar hidden when recording ends with no speech\\n- Discard button clears transcript bar\\n\\n**VAD (3500 ms silence)**\\n- Auto-stop fires after exactly 3500 ms of silence (verified with `page.clock`)\\n- Speech result resets the timer; recording continues\\n- `SILENCE_DELAY = 3500` constant confirmed in source\\n\\n**Slack webhook**\\n- POST made to configured URL with `method = POST`\\n- Payload shape: `{ text, source: \\\"hey-chill\\\", timestamp: ISO-8601 }`\\n- `Content-Type: application/json` header present\\n- Message status: \\\"Sent\\\" on 200, \\\"Failed\\\" on 500, \\\"No webhook set\\\" when unconfigured\\n- Message text HTML-escaped (no `<script>` injection possible)\\n\\n**Settings modal**\\n- Opens on settings button; closes via X / Escape / backdrop click\\n- Webhook URL saved to `localStorage` on Save; pre-populated on reopen\\n- Persists across page reload; can be cleared\\n\\n**PWA**\\n- Manifest has all required fields; `display: standalone`\\n- 192 \u00d7 192 and 512 \u00d7 512 icons present and reachable\\n- `<link rel=\\\"manifest\\\">` in HTML head\\n- `theme-color` meta matches manifest `theme_color`\\n- `apple-mobile-web-app-capable` meta present\\n- Served over HTTPS\\n- Service worker scope covers `hey-chill.vercel.app`, state = `activated`\\n\\n---\\n\\n### Notes\\n\\n- Web Speech API is not available in headless Chromium. A `MockSpeechRecognition` is injected via `page.addInitScript()` before each test. The mock fires `start`, `result`, and `end` events controllably from the test side.\\n- VAD tests use `page.clock.install()` (fake timers) so no real 3.5-second waits are needed.\\n- Webhook tests use `page.route()` for network interception \u2014 no real webhook is hit.\\n\\n---\\n\\n### Recommendation: \u2705 APPROVE \u2014 mark Done\\n\\nAll M1 acceptance criteria are met. The app is stable at the current deployment.\",\"createdAt\":\"2026-03-08T02:28:59.907Z\",\"updatedAt\":\"2026-03-08T02:28:59.884Z\",\"author\":{\"id\":\"b5a6e03a-2da1-4e78-951b-81497e2a00f7\",\"name\":\"Chill\"}}"
      }
    ]
  }
}

{"id":"207a955d-7044-4ef7-bb0a-b6b712180f56","identifier":"FRG-237","title":"Set up QA regression suite for Hey Chill","description":"## Context

Hey Chill M1 is complete. Before M2 starts, we need automated regression tests.

## What to do

1. Read the project description in Linear — it contains the cumulative feature spec.
2. Set up testing in the main repo (chillkimtest-oss/hey-chill). Playwright recommended for PWA testing.
3. Write regression tests covering: push-to-talk UI, VAD silence timeout (3.5s), transcription display, Slack webhook send, PWA installability, service worker.
4. Tests run against: [https://brainwave-ten.vercel.app](<https://brainwave-ten.vercel.app>)

## Key Constraints

* Web Speech API may not work in headless Chrome — consider how to test transcription. May need to mock the SpeechRecognition API.
* Webhook send test: verify the fetch call is made with correct payload. May need to intercept network requests rather than hit the real webhook.
* PWA tests: verify manifest, service worker registration, installability criteria.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Test suite covers all features listed in the project description
* Tests pass against current deployment
* README explains how to run tests","priority":{"value":2,"name":"High"},"url":"https://linear.app/chills-linear/issue/FRG-237/set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill","gitBranchName":"chillkimtest/frg-237-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill","createdAt":"2026-03-07T23:22:09.633Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-08T02:29:03.513Z","archivedAt":null,"completedAt":"2026-03-08T02:29:03.494Z","dueDate":null,"slaStartedAt":null,"slaMediumRiskAt":null,"slaHighRiskAt":null,"slaBreachesAt":null,"slaType":"all","status":"Done","labels":["testing"],"attachments":[],"documents":[],"createdBy":"Chill","createdById":"b5a6e03a-2da1-4e78-951b-81497e2a00f7","project":"Hey Chill","projectId":"5c39b383-018d-4b3b-97c7-d9a5129c119d","team":"Forge","teamId":"c3ef97d8-21a8-4aa7-a818-298f217864dd"}

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #130
--- ## Status DONE ## What Changed - `README.md` — replaced stub with full run instructions and test structure docs - `.gitignore` — added `node_modules/`, `test-results/`, `playwright-report/`, `.env` - `.env.example` — `BASE_URL=https://hey-chill.vercel.app` - `package.json` — Playwright + dotenv; test/smoke/regression/report scripts - `playwright.config.ts` — Chromium, baseURL from env, mic permission granted - `tests/helpers/speech-mock.ts` — injectable `MockSpeechRecognition` + `emitInterimResult` / `emitFinalResult` / `endRecognition` helpers - `tests/smoke/smoke.spec.ts` — 7 smoke tests (title, heading, mic, manifest, SW, sw.js, empty state) - `tests/regression/push-to-talk.spec.ts` — 7 tests (ARIA, classes, hint text, unsupported banner) - `tests/regression/transcription.spec.ts` — 7 tests (interim/final text, transcript bar, discard, concat) - `tests/regression/vad.spec.ts` — 4 tests (3500 ms auto-stop, timer reset, source constant) using `page.clock` - `tests/regression/webhook.spec.ts` — 8 tests (POST, payload shape, Content-Type, status labels, XSS escape) - `tests/regression/settings.spec.ts` — 8 tests (modal open/close, localStorage persistence, reload) - `tests/regression/pwa.spec.ts` — 13 tests (manifest fields, icons, SW scope/state, HTTPS, meta tags) ## Key Decisions - Used `page.addInitScript` to inject the mock before app scripts run — avoids needing to intercept `new SpeechRecognition()` after the fact - Fixed strict-mode bug in mock: `event.type` is a read-only accessor on `Event.prototype`; removed the assignment; used `new Event(name)` directly - `_emitResult` must explicitly call `this.onresult(event)` — plain `EventTarget.dispatchEvent` does not invoke `on*` handler properties in custom subclasses - Used `page.waitForResponse` for the payload-capture test to avoid a race between async fetch and the test assertion - VAD tests use `page.clock.install()` — avoids real 3.5-second waits; all 54 tests finish in ~19 s ## PR / Branch - Branch: `chillkimtest/frg-237-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill` - PR: https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/hey-chill-qa/pull/new/chillkimtest/frg-237-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "---\n\n## Status\nDONE\n\n## What Changed\n- `README.md` \u2014 replaced stub with full run instructions and test structure docs\n- `.gitignore` \u2014 added `node_modules/`, `test-results/`, `playwright-report/`, `.env`\n- `.env.example` \u2014 `BASE_URL=https://hey-chill.vercel.app`\n- `package.json` \u2014 Playwright + dotenv; test/smoke/regression/report scripts\n- `playwright.config.ts` \u2014 Chromium, baseURL from env, mic permission granted\n- `tests/helpers/speech-mock.ts` \u2014 injectable `MockSpeechRecognition` + `emitInterimResult` / `emitFinalResult` / `endRecognition` helpers\n- `tests/smoke/smoke.spec.ts` \u2014 7 smoke tests (title, heading, mic, manifest, SW, sw.js, empty state)\n- `tests/regression/push-to-talk.spec.ts` \u2014 7 tests (ARIA, classes, hint text, unsupported banner)\n- `tests/regression/transcription.spec.ts` \u2014 7 tests (interim/final text, transcript bar, discard, concat)\n- `tests/regression/vad.spec.ts` \u2014 4 tests (3500 ms auto-stop, timer reset, source constant) using `page.clock`\n- `tests/regression/webhook.spec.ts` \u2014 8 tests (POST, payload shape, Content-Type, status labels, XSS escape)\n- `tests/regression/settings.spec.ts` \u2014 8 tests (modal open/close, localStorage persistence, reload)\n- `tests/regression/pwa.spec.ts` \u2014 13 tests (manifest fields, icons, SW scope/state, HTTPS, meta tags)\n\n## Key Decisions\n- Used `page.addInitScript` to inject the mock before app scripts run \u2014 avoids needing to intercept `new SpeechRecognition()` after the fact\n- Fixed strict-mode bug in mock: `event.type` is a read-only accessor on `Event.prototype`; removed the assignment; used `new Event(name)` directly\n- `_emitResult` must explicitly call `this.onresult(event)` \u2014 plain `EventTarget.dispatchEvent` does not invoke `on*` handler properties in custom subclasses\n- Used `page.waitForResponse` for the payload-capture test to avoid a race between async fetch and the test assertion\n- VAD tests use `page.clock.install()` \u2014 avoids real 3.5-second waits; all 54 tests finish in ~19 s\n\n## PR / Branch\n- Branch: `chillkimtest/frg-237-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill`\n- PR: https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/hey-chill-qa/pull/new/chillkimtest/frg-237-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-hey-chill"
  }
}
